sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20815" key="bra/sis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βράσις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n20815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boiling</tr_>, of water, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
